title: ChatGPT's image generator can be manipulated to produce violent, sexual content
abstract: ChatGPT's image generator can be manipulated to produce violent, sexual content delivers solid reasoning and generation capabilities through a straightforward API. It is not another ChatGPT wrapper — ...
abstract_zh: 伙计们，发现了个神器——那个叫 **ChatGPT's image generator** 的家伙。别看它平时不声不响的，关键时刻能帮你解决大问题！比如写周报时突然卡壳，它能瞬间生成各种创意图，助你灵感迸发；调Bug时遇到脑力极限，给它几个关键词，它就能产出超有料的画面，让你豁然开朗。绝对比那些死板工具强多了！快试试吧！
